title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering separates the model from its surrounding infrastructure (rules, skills, hooks, subagents), with the harness comprising roughly 98% of a coding agent's value. It operates on two levels: the AI layer within a single session and orchestration of multiple agent sessions into focused workflows to scale reliability.
